name: Down Home Grilled Hamburgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the onions by slicing them into thick slices and placing them in a plastic bag or glass jar with ice water. Seal and refrigerate until ready to use. This will make the onions crisp and juicy.
2. Slice the tomato into thick slices. Mix the sour cream, chopped green onions (with tops removed), bread crumbs, Worcestershire sauce, and lemon pepper seasoning into the ground beef until well combined. Shape into 4 patties.
3. To cook the hamburger patties:
- GRILL: Place on a grill over hot coals and cook to desired doneness, turning only once or twice.
- BROIL: Place in a broiler pan; broil to desired doneness.
- MICROWAVE: Place in a microwave-safe dish covered loosely with plastic wrap (made for microwave use); vent one edge slightly. Microwave on highest power for 3 minutes. Turn patties over and cook an additional 3 minutes, or until done. Rotate the dish 1/4 turn every 1-2 minutes.
- Drain well before serving.
4. Mix mayonnaise, mustard, and catsup well.
5. To serve, spread the catsup mixture evenly on warm hamburger buns. Place a meat patty, tomato slice, onion slice, and shredded lettuce on top. Also good with alfalfa or radish sprouts.
